failures.expected: On 02/05/2025, a fire originating at 600 N. Michigan Avenue, Suite 800, Chicago, IL 60611, owned or operated by Alliance Building Services, spread to our insured's adjacent property at 700 Central Expressway, Santa Clara, CA 95050. The Santa Clara Fire Department responded and confirmed the fire originated at your client's property. The fire department report (Incident No. FD-2025-93520) indicates the cause was improperly discarded smoking materials.
failures.actual: On 02/05/2025, a fire originating at 600 N. Michigan Avenue, Suite 800, Chicago, IL 60611, owned or operated by Alliance Building Services, spread to our insured's adjacent property at 700 Central Expressway, Santa Clara, CA 95050. The Santa Clara Fire Department responded and confirmed the fire originated at your client's property. The fire department report (Incident No. FD-2025-93520) indicates the cause was improperly discarded smoking materials. Our insured, Dorothy H. Kessler, sustained the following damages as a result: - Structural damage to exterior wall and roof - Smoke damage throughout interior - Damaged personal property - Temporary housing costs during repairs
failures.detail: expected "On 02/05/2025, a fire originating at 600 N. failures.expected: On 01/08/2025, construction work being performed by Horizon Landscaping Services at 330 Madison Avenue, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10017 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 1100 N. Meridian Street, Oklahoma City, OK 73107. The damage resulted from failure to secure construction debris during the construction process. Our insured, Maria L. Vasquez, reported cracking in foundation walls and ceilings beginning shortly after construction commenced.
failures.actual: On 01/08/2025, construction work being performed by Horizon Landscaping Services at 330 Madison Avenue, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10017 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 1100 N. Meridian Street, Oklahoma City, OK 73107. The damage resulted from failure to secure construction debris during the construction process. Our insured, Maria L. Vasquez, reported cracking in foundation walls and ceilings beginning shortly after construction commenced. Our adjuster inspected the property on 10/09/2026 and documented: - Damaged drywall and plaster throughout first floor - Cracked exterior brick veneer - Broken windows from vibration impact

Our adjuster inspected the property on 10/09/2026 and documented: - Damaged drywall and plaster throughout first floor - Cracked exterior brick veneer - Broken windows from vibration impact"

failures.expected: On 05/21/2026, construction work being performed by Pacific Coast Moving & Storage at 5100 Port Road, Savannah, GA 31415 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 2700 University Avenue, Minneapolis, MN 55414. The damage resulted from excessive vibration from pile driving during the construction process.
failures.actual: On 05/21/2026, construction work being performed by Pacific Coast Moving & Storage at 5100 Port Road, Savannah, GA 31415 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 2700 University Avenue, Minneapolis, MN 55414. The damage resulted from excessive vibration from pile driving during the construction process. Our insured, Elizabeth R. Dominguez, reported water intrusion through damaged exterior beginning shortly after construction commenced. Our adjuster inspected the property on 05/22/2026 and documented: - Foundation cracks requiring structural repair - Cracked exterior brick veneer - Damaged plumbing connections
failures.detail: expected "On 05/21/2026, construction work being performed by Pacific Coast Moving & Storage at 5100 Port Road, Savannah, GA 31415 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 2700 University Avenue, Minneapolis, MN 55414. The damage resulted from excessive vibration from pile driving during the construction process.", got "On 05/21/2026, construction work being performed by Pacific Coast Moving & Storage at 5100 Port Road, Savannah, GA 31415 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 2700 University Avenue, Minneapolis, MN 55414. The damage resulted from excessive vibration from pile driving during the construction process. Our insured, Elizabeth R. Dominguez, reported water intrusion through damaged exterior beginning shortly after construction commenced. Our adjuster inspected the property on 05/22/2026 and documented: - Foundation cracks requiring structural repair - Cracked exterior brick veneer - Damaged plumbing connections"
